policy: Reference-parity skips are forbidden unless the suite is listed here. PASS results with skipped cases must be listed under allowed_case_skips. FAIL results are never allowlisted here.

weak_reference_tolerances.beads: pybaselines implementation differs materially; current tolerance is a compatibility ceiling, not tight parity
weak_reference_tolerances.filter_composite: known boundary-cell divergence in quality/leverage composition
